title: GSE8193 Expression Data
author: Yau, Christina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Expression data from age-dichotomized ER+ breast tumors. 
 To investigate the biological basis between aging and sporadic breast cancer incidence and prognosis, RNA samples from matched ER+ invasive breast cancers diagnosed in either young (≤45) or old (≥70) women were analyzed by expression microarrays.
steps_raw:
Expression data from age-dichotomized ER+ breast tumors. 
 To investigate the biological basis between aging and sporadic breast cancer incidence and prognosis, RNA samples from matched ER+ invasive breast cancers diagnosed in either young (≤45) or old (≥70) women were analyzed by expression microarrays.
